a:r.a:t: Private And Confidential | Photon® Interactive UK Limited, Copyright ©2026
Formula: Protection rate × $3.90M at risk × 3 months ÷ 12

Phase 1 (18%): 18%×$3.90M×3/12 = $176k Phase 2 (18%): MTTR gain only · no new prevention → +$176k = $352k cumulative Phase 3 (29%): 29%×$3.90M×3/12 = $284k → $636k cumulative Phase 4 (32%): 32%×$3.90M×3/12 = $312k → $949k cumulative
% of 473 qualifying incidents caught before impact

Phase 1 — 18%: STM synthetic tests cover top 5 journeys · ~51% of 473 catchable · 35% of those prevented before guest impact Phase 2 — AI triage compresses MTTR · adds no new detection Phase 3 — 29%: cross-brand observability adds pre-failure signals + correlated API anomaly detection · additional ~11% Phase 4 — 32% ceiling: known patterns auto-resolved · remaining 68% require SRE judgment — cannot be auto-resolved by design
time saved vs manual L1 triage-to-assign per incident

Baseline today: 45–60 min per qualifying incident · manual read · manual routing Phase 1 — 18%: alert fires before guest calls Phase 2 — 42%: AI classifies, enriches and routes · no manual L1 Phase 3 — 58%: observability context pinpoints root cause in minutes · reduces bridge call and war-room time Phase 4 — 68%: known patterns fully auto-resolved · consistent with 60–70% reduction in comparable AMS AI deployments
